violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Sesame seeds and beans packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2025

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2025
At time of inspection, single service items were observed stored in mop sink. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

At time of inspection, ambient of drink cooler was 45 degrees Fahrenheit and ambient of produce cooler was 46 degrees Fahrenheit. No TCS foods observed. Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
Ceiling tiles in the retail area were observed stained brown with previous water damage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The condensate from the drink refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Market shelves observed lined with cardboard. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
The floors are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives on the knife rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

Chicken was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was relocated to freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front of the market, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2023

The meat display case was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees F or below. Meat display case must be repaired, replaced, or removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the plastic display cases have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. The ice cream freezer has an accumulation of frost and debris. The ice cream freezer must be cleaned or removed from the premises. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
The floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

The floors especially beneath plastic soda racks used as dunnage racks have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the front display case refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023

Dry beans and produce packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies near mop sink. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Oh Snap Pest Control Service last date of service 6/13/2023. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The door to the outside, located in the market, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023

Knives are stored inside an unclean knife holder between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
Water observed in stacked meat trays. Equipment and utensils must be air dried after cleaning and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
Water observed in stacked meat trays. Equipment and utensils must be air dried after cleaning and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Cardboard is used to line refrigerator shelves. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Wood is used in the construction of shelves in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
The slicer was not in good repair, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Slicer must be removed from the establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
Drain plugs are needed for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the display cases, refrigerators, knife holder have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris.The ice cream chest freezer has an accumulation of frozen condensate and ice. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter.Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
Some ceiling tiles in the market are in poor repair with stains from previous water damage.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
The floor in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
Light bulbs in ceiling lights in the kitchen area are burned out. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
Ceiling light covers have an accumulation of dead insects and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023

Ceiling tiles in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023

An area of the wall in the kitchen is in poor repair, with duct taped cardboard above the chest freezer. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in a business storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
